Calculators Guides About
Home › All calculators

All 67 calculators

Every free tool on FinCalc Lab, grouped by topic. Each one runs entirely in your browser, shows the formula it uses, and explains what the result means.

No calculators match — try another word.

Savings & Investing 15

📈 Compound Interest Calculator Project how savings grow with monthly deposits and compounding. 🎯 Savings Goal Calculator Find the exact monthly saving needed to hit a target amount. 🌴 Retirement Savings Calculator Project your nest egg and the income it could support. 📊 Investment Return (CAGR) Calculator Turn a total gain into an honest annualized return. 💹 ROI Calculator Total and annualized return on any investment or project. ⏳ Rule of 72 Calculator Estimate doubling time from an interest or growth rate. 🕐 Present Value Calculator Discount a future sum back to today's dollars. 🪙 Dividend Income Calculator Annual dividend income, yield and reinvested growth. 📐 Simple Interest Calculator Interest on principal only, no compounding. 🏦 CD Calculator Maturity value and interest earned on a CD. 🔁 APY Calculator Turn a nominal rate + compounding into true APY. 📉 Real Rate of Return Calculator What your return is really worth after inflation. 💰 Millionaire Calculator Years to reach $1,000,000 (or any target). 🔮 Future Value Calculator Grow a lump sum plus deposits to a future value. 🪤 Investment Fee Impact Calculator How much a fund's annual fee costs you over time.

Retirement 6

🏦 401(k) Calculator Project 401(k) growth including the employer match. 💰 Roth IRA Calculator Project tax-free Roth IRA growth from regular contributions. 🏖️ Retirement Withdrawal Calculator How long a nest egg lasts at a given withdrawal. 💵 Annuity Payout Calculator Monthly income a lump sum can pay over a period. 🔥 FIRE Number Calculator Your target nest egg for financial independence. 🏄 Coast FIRE Calculator The amount that grows to retirement with no new savings.

Loans & Debt 17

💳 Loan Payment Calculator Monthly payment, total interest and cost of any amortized loan. 🏠 Mortgage Calculator Full monthly housing cost: loan, property tax and insurance. 🚀 Loan Payoff Calculator See how extra monthly payments shorten a loan and cut interest. 🧊 Debt Avalanche vs Snowball Calculator Compare the two classic payoff strategies on your own debts. 🚗 Car Affordability Calculator Turn a monthly budget into a realistic car price. 💳 Credit Card Payoff Calculator How long to clear a card, and what interest costs you. ⚖️ Debt-to-Income (DTI) Calculator The ratio lenders use to approve mortgages and loans. 🔑 House Down Payment Calculator Down payment amount and monthly saving to reach it. 🔄 Mortgage Refinance Calculator Monthly savings and break-even point of refinancing. 🎓 Student Loan Calculator Monthly payment and total interest on student debt. 🗝️ Car Lease Calculator Estimate a monthly lease payment from the key terms. 🏡 Extra Mortgage Payment Calculator How extra payments cut mortgage interest and time. 🗓️ Biweekly Mortgage Calculator How biweekly payments shorten your mortgage. 📅 Amortization Schedule Calculator Yearly principal vs interest breakdown of any loan. 🧮 Debt Consolidation Calculator See if one consolidated loan beats your current debts. 🏦 Home Equity Calculator Your home equity and borrowable amount at a target LTV. 🏡 Home Affordability Calculator Max home price from your income using the 28/36 rule.

Income & Budgeting 13

💰 Salary to Hourly Calculator Convert annual salary to hourly, weekly and monthly pay. 🧾 Take-Home Pay Estimator Estimate net monthly pay from gross salary and tax rates. 💸 50/30/20 Budget Calculator Split your take-home pay into needs, wants and savings. 🛟 Emergency Fund Calculator Size your emergency fund and see how long it takes to build. 🎈 Inflation Calculator See what today's money will be worth in the future. 📋 Net Worth Calculator Add up what you own, subtract what you owe. 📆 Hourly to Salary Calculator Convert an hourly wage into weekly, monthly and yearly pay. 🏡 Rent Affordability Calculator A sensible rent range based on your income. ⏰ Overtime Pay Calculator Total weekly pay including overtime at any multiplier. 💵 Paycheck Calculator Gross and net pay per paycheck by pay frequency. 📈 Pay Raise Calculator New pay after a raise, and if it beats inflation. 💹 Savings Rate Calculator Your savings rate and what it means for freedom. 📈 Rent Increase Calculator New rent after an increase, and if it's fair.

Taxes & Shopping 4

🧾 Sales Tax Calculator Add sales tax to a price, or back it out of a total. 🏷️ Discount Calculator Final price after a percentage off, and what you save. 🍽️ Tip Calculator Work out the tip and split a bill between people. 🧾 VAT Calculator Add VAT to a net price or extract it from a gross price.

Business 9

⚖️ Break-Even Point Calculator How many sales cover your costs — the first business question. 📉 Profit Margin Calculator Margin, markup and profit from cost and price. 🧑‍💻 Freelance Hourly Rate Calculator Turn a target income into the hourly rate you must charge. 🏷️ Markup Calculator Set a selling price from cost and desired markup. 🎯 LTV : CAC Ratio Calculator Lifetime value vs acquisition cost — is growth healthy? 🚀 Startup Runway Calculator Months of cash left from burn rate and balance. ⏳ Payback Period Calculator Time for an investment to recoup its cost. 📐 EBITDA Calculator EBITDA and margin from your income statement. 🏘️ Rental Property ROI Calculator Cap rate, cash flow and cash-on-cash return.

Everyday Math 3

🔢 Percentage Calculator Three everyday percentage questions in one tool. ⛽ Fuel Cost Calculator Cost of a trip, and yearly fuel spend. 🛒 Unit Price Calculator Find the real cost per unit and the better deal.
FinCalc Lab

Free, fast and honest financial calculators. All tools run entirely in your browser — we never see or store your numbers.

About Contact Privacy Policy Terms of Use

© 2026 FinCalc Lab. All calculators and articles are for educational purposes only and do not constitute financial advice. Consult a qualified professional before making financial decisions.
